author: Tim Froehlich
text: skill-pr-agent reports: CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR is empty (not set) in teammate sessions. Shell cwd resets to parent repo (PinPoint-AntiGravity) after each Bash command. No hook errors observed, but empty CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR means PostToolUse hooks referencing it would fail silently.

author: Tim Froehlich
text: jsdoc-pr-agent confirms same: CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR is empty. Shell cwd resets to PinPoint-AntiGravity (lead's worktree) after each Bash command, NOT the teammate's assigned worktree. Both agents saw no hook errors — likely because pre-commit hooks use git's path resolution (not CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR), and the PostToolUse/TaskCompleted hooks either ran from the right place or failed silently due to empty var.
